title: Setpoints (optimizer-plan local copy)
description: Local copy of the platform Setpoints / SetpointsPatch shape, carried so the optimizer-plan contract is self-contained (the self-contained-contract convention; mirrors contracts/optimizer-write-rest/components/schemas/setpoints.json). The plan carries a SetpointsPatch as immediate_setpoints and on every trajectory point. Cross-field invariants the schema cannot express (humidity_low_pct < humidity_high_pct, day_end after day_start, moisture_low < moisture_high) are enforced by Phase 2 on the write path and surface as 422.

ZoneTargets.description: One irrigation zone's runtime-adjustable targets, matched by zone_id.

moisture_low_threshold.description: Irrigation triggers below this soil moisture (VWC, 0-1). Must be below moisture_high_threshold.

moisture_high_threshold.description: Irrigation stops above this soil moisture (VWC, 0-1). Must be above moisture_low_threshold.

Setpoints.description: A greenhouse's full target bundle: the global climate setpoints plus per-zone irrigation targets. Numeric targets only - never a crop. Temperature is a day/night pair resolved against the day window.

day_start.description: Start of the day window, local time-of-day HH:MM (24h).

day_end.description: End of the day window, local time-of-day HH:MM (24h). Must be after day_start.

humidity_low_pct.description: Lower humidity safety bound (%RH). Must be below humidity_high_pct.

humidity_high_pct.description: Upper humidity safety bound (%RH). Must be above humidity_low_pct.

humidity_deadband_pct.description: Full hysteresis band width around the VPD-derived RH target (%RH).

co2_vent_interlock_threshold_pct.description: Vent position above which the CO₂ injector is hard-interlocked off (% open).

vpd_target_kpa.description: Vapor-pressure-deficit target (kPa) - the primary humidity control input.

dli_target_mol.description: Daily Light Integral target driving supplemental lighting (mol·m⁻²·day⁻¹).

zones.description: Per-zone irrigation targets, one entry per configured zone.

SetpointsPatch.description: Partial (merge) update of a Setpoints bundle - any non-empty subset of the same fields, same bounds. Absent fields are unchanged; a present `zones` array updates the named zones (each must specify its full target set), matched by zone_id. This is the refined-targets shape the optimizer proposes.
